title: taraxacum subgrandidens
intro: Taraxacum subgrandidens, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Eastern Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Taraxacum subgrandidens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Taraxacum subgrandidens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food ingredient in some Asian cuisines.
